creator: mldodson@comcast.net
text:
I am the maintainer of this port  This pr (1) updates my email address. (2) Sets a new MASTER_SITES as the software has been superceded by AmberTools-1.0 from the same development group, and the distribution is no longer available from them. (3) Marks the port as DEPRECATED since the software has been superceded.  I will prepare a port of AmberTools soon, but in the meantime I will be hosting the nab distribution on my own server as it is no longer available from the developer.

How-To-Repeat: N. A.
